## Scope

Updates `scripts/guard-eval2-persistence-boundary.sh` so the canonical artifact registry is treated as a descriptor file.

## Change

Adds `lib/evaluation/artifacts/artifactRegistry.ts` as a descriptor-only registry path.

The existing boundary checks remain in place for normal source files.

## Out of scope

- No runtime code
- No processor changes
- No stage-machine changes
- No schema changes
- No route, worker, cron, SQL, prompt, or UI changes

## Reason

The artifact registry names canonical artifact types for metadata purposes. This PR keeps that metadata declaration separate from actual persistence behavior.
